title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.513 - Purple Heart Trail designated for a portion of I-70 and I
text:
227.513.  Purple Heart Trail designated for a portion of I-70 and I-44. — The portion of Interstate 70 from the Kansas/Missouri state line east to the Missouri/Illinois state line, and the portion of Interstate 44 within the state of Missouri to the Missouri/Oklahoma state line, shall be designated the "Purple Heart Trail".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donations.
(L. 2012 S.B. 480)
